name: envguard
description: Runtime .env contract enforcer. Define typed, validated contracts for your environment variables. Zero dependencies.

scripts.example: node -e "const {example}=require('.'); example({DATABASE_URL:{type:'url',description:'PostgreSQL connection URL'},PORT:{type:'port',default:'3000'},NODE_ENV:{type:'enum',values:['development','production'],default:'development'},JWT_SECRET:{type:'string',required:true,minLength:32,description:'Secret key for JWT signing'}})"

author: AXIOM <axiom@yonderzenith.com>
